title: Birds reach next round
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - It seems as if...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - It seems as if Oriented Birds Football Club have sharpened their skills, as they downed Salim United from Hermanus in the Overberg Region 2-0 in an exciting preliminary-round game in the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Nedbank Cup competition on Saturday 28 September at Kwanokuthula Stadium in Plettenberg Bay.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - It seems as if Oriented Birds Football Club have sharpened their skills, as they downed Salim United from Hermanus in the Overberg Region 2-0 in an exciting preliminary-round game in the Western Cape ABC Motsepe Nedbank Cup competition on Saturday 28 September at Kwanokuthula Stadium in Plettenberg Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Skipper Khanyisani \"Mashesha\" Radebe scored a brace for the Plett team, and their shot-stopper Siphosethu Nyhunyha went home with a clean sheet.","html":"Skipper Khanyisani \"Mashesha\" Radebe scored a brace for the Plett team, and their shot-stopper Siphosethu Nyhunyha went home with a clean sheet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe led his side to their first Nedbank Cup competition win and managed to break through and score his brace in the first half.","html":"Radebe led his side to their first Nedbank Cup competition win and managed to break through and score his brace in the first half."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Fast pace"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The preliminary-round knockout game started at a fast pace, with Birds controlling the centre of the field - pushing for their first goal.","html":"The preliminary-round knockout game started at a fast pace, with Birds controlling the centre of the field - pushing for their first goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They received a set piece just outside the box, but a Salim centre-back did very well in sweeping away a dangerous ball.","html":"They received a set piece just outside the box, but a Salim centre-back did very well in sweeping away a dangerous ball."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Siyanda \"Sporho\" Madlala was looking sharp on the attack, creating more chances inside the box, and Birds' Mxolisi Tshabalala was doing well on the left side of the field.","html":"Siyanda \"Sporho\" Madlala was looking sharp on the attack, creating more chances inside the box, and Birds' Mxolisi Tshabalala was doing well on the left side of the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Then Birds took the game from the visiting team, attacking with their wingers - Radebe delivered a powerful strike inside the box and netted his first goal, making it 1-0.","html":"Then Birds took the game from the visiting team, attacking with their wingers - Radebe delivered a powerful strike inside the box and netted his first goal, making it 1-0."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hitting back, Ntandazo Magqalaza of Salim missed an opportunity inside the box, his shot going over the crossbar.","html":"Hitting back, Ntandazo Magqalaza of Salim missed an opportunity inside the box, his shot going over the crossbar."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe scored his second goal, to make it 2-0 just before half-time. No more goals were scored in the second half.","html":"Radebe scored his second goal, to make it 2-0 just before half-time. No more goals were scored in the second half."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mfundo Bophela of Oriented Birds clears the ball.","html":"Mfundo Bophela of Oriented Birds clears the ball."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
